title: Better Useless
description: Let's give a second life to useless items...
body:
# Making Useless Items Useful  

This mod gives new functionality to items that currently lack significant use in the game.  

## Better fletching table

The fletching table has been replaced by the **Fletching Workbench** which can upgrade your bows !

![The new fletching Workbench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df87a851770b3d278fbabf1a23375a0630d38b99.jpeg)

## Cookable Eggs  
You can now cook eggs, including the elusive **End Egg**!  

![Cooking an egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50ae7f80d0deb34ed984c94e2efee87a25c39b62.jpeg)  
![Cooked End Egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d1ef38a88e39fa3f9a33bee0022801b6429cc18.jpeg)  

## Craft Chocolate  
Cocoa beans can now be used to make **edible chocolate**!  

![Edible chocolate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee7916e54dd5c816d1212bc34e542fce52c93a6.jpeg)  

## Learn More  

I created this mod for the following video:
